exchanges.prompt: Design an AWS serverless API with API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, and CloudWatch monitoring

response.content:
graph TD
    participant Client as "Client"
    participant API_Gateway as "API Gateway"
    participant Lambda as "Lambda Function"
    participant DynamoDB as "DynamoDB Table"
    participant S3 as "S3 Bucket"
    participant CloudWatch as "CloudWatch Monitoring"

    Client -->|API Request| API_Gateway
    API_Gateway -->|Trigger Lambda| Lambda
    Lambda -->|Read/Write Data| DynamoDB
    Lambda -->|Store/Retrieve Files| S3
    Lambda -->|Log Events| CloudWatch
    CloudWatch -->|Monitor and Log| Lambda
    DynamoDB -->|Return Data| Lambda
    S3 -->|Return Files| Lambda
    Lambda -->|Return Response| API_Gateway
    API_Gateway -->|Return Response| Client

    style Client fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style API_Gateway fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style Lambda fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style DynamoDB fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style S3 fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style CloudWatch fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
